title: Potato Peeler Vegetable Peelers Include Orange Citrus Peelers, Ergonomic Non-Slip Handle & Sharp Blade Stainless Steel Y & I Shapes Swivel Peeler for Fruit Carrot Eggplant Cucumber(Silver)
features: 【Advanced & Multi-Function】: Advanced vegetable fruit peeler is designed with proper gaps, which helps to avoid blocking when peeling fruits or vegetables, combining with the pointed slice, you can peel quickly and easily
【High-Quality Material】: Made of high-quality rust-free carbon steel which included durable and anti-corrosion zinc alloy body, more suitable for dishwasher safe and easy to store
【Peels Easy and Save Time】: Y vegetable peeler can maintain minimal resistance when peeling. It is perfect for peeling fruit or vegetable skin and will not clog with peels, save more time and labor

【Ergonomic Design】: Streamlined design makes peeling action smooth. Meanwhile, it will not feel uncomfortable if you are the left hand user, also good for arthritis hands. There are 2Pcs orange peelers which are easy for you to peel orange, lemon and so on.
【 Grip and Control】: The rubber part will keep the handle non-slip when your hands or peeler get wet. Y shape peeler holder can stably control the peeler so that is stressed uniformly.
description: Product Description What does vegetable peeler set of 2 includes? The Y peeler and I peeler are made of stainless steel. An indispensable tool in every kitchen to help complete the peeling of vegetables and fruits. Now your vegetarian and vegetable side dishes can be prepared quickly and easily. Stainless Steel I peeler. Peeling potatoes, any fruit or vegetable, hard vegetable skin. The top part of the peeler has a potato eye remover. Stainless Steel y-peeler. Helps you shred cabbage easily, slicing vegetables or cheese. Now your vegetarian and vegetable side dishes are easy and quick to make. It is a great carrot peeler, apple peeler, potato peeler, mangoes peeler, orange peeler, and butternut squash peeler, which means it makes kitchen work a lot easier! Ergonomic design works in the right or left hand. Hand wash and towel dry immediately. Convenient potato eye remover. Warning: Not for children; the blade is very sharp. Simple Removalof ThinSkin The angle of inclination of the blade is the key to thin skin.Our peeler does not require much skill to peel the fruit without too much polp. Flexible Swivel Blade It fits the curved surfaces of apples, potatoes, and pears better during use. Our rotating peeler has a limited angle and will not lose control. De-eye Design Using the small triangle on the side of the Y peeler allows you to quickly remove potato sprouts, apple spots, and even open citrus. The top of the I peeler also has Dig-Design. Safe Peelers The cutting edge of the blade is designed inward. This allows you to avoid injury to your fingers to a certain extent when you accidentally hold or press. Compact Design for Easy Storage The Y peeler can be hung on your kitchen hook.It is easy to store in the drawer after the dishwasher is cleaned. Simple Design for Easy Cleaning Fruit and vegetable residues on smooth blades are easier to clean than those on serrated blades. The blade made of stainless steel is more durable and not easy to rust.
